name: Louisiana Shrimp W/Tomato/Vidalia Onion Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Red bell pepper, roasted and julienne
1 Yellow bell pepper, roasted and julienne
1 Green bell pepper, roasted and julienne
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy skillet, sauté onions in olive oil until translucent.
2. Add garlic and render until golden.
3. Stir in tomato paste and brown for about 2 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Incorporate lemon segments and juice, stock, roasted jalapeno, and bell peppers.
6. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 15 minutes.
7. Adjust seasoning as desired.
8. Stir in chopped green onions and cilantro.
9. When the sauce reaches the desired consistency, adjust seasoning again and whisk in whole butter.
10. Heat olive oil in another pan and sauté shrimp over high heat until fully cooked (about 10 minutes).
11. Serve with adjusted seasoning.
